hero.headline: We Design for Qatar's Schools & Nurseries
hero.subheadline: Brand identities, websites, and print design that help educational institutions in Qatar stand out.

about.headline: Design That Understands Education
about.body: Berry Design Qatar was built for one purpose: to help schools, nurseries, and kindergartens in Qatar build brands they're proud of. We understand the unique needs of educational institutions — the balance between professional credibility and approachable warmth. From your logo to your website to your printed materials, we handle every touchpoint of your visual identity.

services.headline: Our Services
services.subheadline: Everything your institution needs to look professional and stand out.
services.service1Desc: Logo design, color systems, and brand guidelines for educational institutions.
services.service2Desc: Fast, bilingual, mobile-first websites built for Qatar's schools and nurseries.
services.service3Desc: Brochures, prospectuses, banners, and enrollment materials.
services.service4Desc: Campus signage, classroom labels, and directional systems.
services.service5Desc: On-brand templates and content your team can use every day.
services.service6Desc: Open day materials, admissions kits, and campaign assets.

portfolio.headline: Our Work
portfolio.subheadline: Brands we've built for Qatar's education sector.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to elevate your institution's brand? Let's talk.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Designing the future of Qatar's education sector.

pricing.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the 799 QAR website package for my school/nursery.
